    <div wire:id="2Bk4nJOPAClfH3wQuBVw" wire:initial-data="{&quot;fingerprint&quot;:{&quot;id&quot;:&quot;2Bk4nJOPAClfH3wQuBVw&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;bannerhome.bannerhome&quot;,&quot;locale&quot;:&quot;th&quot;,&quot;path&quot;:&quot;\/&quot;,&quot;method&quot;:&quot;GET&quot;,&quot;v&quot;:&quot;acj&quot;},&quot;effects&quot;:{&quot;listeners&quot;:[],&quot;path&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com&quot;},&quot;serverMemo&quot;:{&quot;children&quot;:[],&quot;errors&quot;:[],&quot;htmlHash&quot;:&quot;70b83308&quot;,&quot;data&quot;:{&quot;position&quot;:&quot;Top&quot;,&quot;page&quot;:1,&quot;paginators&quot;:{&quot;page&quot;:1}},&quot;dataMeta&quot;:[],&quot;checksum&quot;:&quot;99b2aa27ad36b04c3586351b1ca2d7c9b15acc980602347a3fad4fb8a7a2e1a8&quot;}}">
    <div x-data="bannerRotation([{&quot;image&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com\/storage\/banners\/uLrplUuEJAzR59c2YSNo4hvGi1tSJ0-metaQmFubmVyIFdlYiBZSCsgKDIpLnBuZw==-.png&quot;,&quot;duration&quot;:10000,&quot;click_url&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/lin.ee\/ZfKYevkE&quot;},{&quot;image&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com\/storage\/banners\/6qKjwlCeSftwsPg9m9WKiZWVhqqxZ0-metad2ViX2hhcHB5IGNsYXNzX21hcjI2LTAxLmpwZw==-.jpg&quot;,&quot;duration&quot;:15000,&quot;click_url&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/www.younghappyplus.com\/section\/HappyClass-ESG-Bonding-Hub&quot;},{&quot;image&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com\/storage\/banners\/t0IPmPxYO8yTeVE5xy8Oal4YZFqBsv-meta4LiV4Liy4Lij4Liy4LiH4LmA4Lij4Li14Lii4LiZ4Lit4Lit4LiZ4LmE4Lil4LiZ4LmMIFlIKyDguJvguKPguLDguIjguLPguYDguJTguLfguK3guJkgKDEpICgxKS5qcGc=-.jpg&quot;,&quot;duration&quot;:15000,&quot;click_url&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/www.younghappyplus.com\/article\/younghappyplus-calendar&quot;}])" x-init="startRotation()" x-show="banners.length > 0 && currentPage !== null">
        <div class="flex w-full">
            <template x-for="(banner, index) in banners" :key="index">
                <div x-show="currentPage === index" 
                     class="w-full transition-opacity duration-500"
                     :class="{ 'cursor-pointer': banner.click_url }">
                    <a :href="banner.click_url" 
                       x-bind:target="banner.click_url ? '_blank' : ''"
                       class="block">
                        <img :src="banner.image" 
                             class="w-full h-auto object-cover">
                    </a>
                </div>
            </template>
        </div>
        <div class="text-center py-5 -my-2 
                            bg-white
                    ">
            <ul class="flex justify-center">
                <template x-for="(banner, index) in banners" :key="index">
                    <li>
                        <button 
                            type="button" 
                            x-on:click="stopRotation(); currentPage = index; startRotation()"
                            class="pagination__dot" 
                            :class="{ 'active': currentPage === index }">
                        </button>
                    </li>
                </template>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    function bannerRotation(banners) {
        return {
            banners,
            currentPage: 0,
            timer: null,
            startRotation() {
                if (this.timer) clearInterval(this.timer);
                const currentDuration = this.banners[this.currentPage]?.duration || 5000;

                this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                    this.nextPage();
                }, currentDuration);
            },
            nextPage() {
                this.currentPage = (this.currentPage + 1) % this.banners.length;
                this.startRotation();
            },
            stopRotation() {
                clearInterval(this.timer);
            }
        };
    }
</script>

<style>
    .pagination__dot {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin: 0 5px;
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .pagination__dot:hover {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        transform: scale(1.2);
    }

    .pagination__dot.active {
        background-color: #FFDA20;
        transform: scale(1.3);
    }
</style>

<!-- Livewire Component wire-end:2Bk4nJOPAClfH3wQuBVw -->

                    <!-- ปุ่มเลื่อนซ้าย -->

                    <!-- คอร์สในพื้นที่ตรงกลาง -->

                                                    <div wire:id="HfTxKfNFMz6ggNR50XZw" wire:initial-data="{&quot;fingerprint&quot;:{&quot;id&quot;:&quot;HfTxKfNFMz6ggNR50XZw&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;home-courses.premium-code-course&quot;,&quot;locale&quot;:&quot;th&quot;,&quot;path&quot;:&quot;\/&quot;,&quot;method&quot;:&quot;GET&quot;,&quot;v&quot;:&quot;acj&quot;},&quot;effects&quot;:{&quot;listeners&quot;:[&quot;bookConfirmed&quot;,&quot;nextMyCourse&quot;,&quot;refreshCourse&quot;]},&quot;serverMemo&quot;:{&quot;children&quot;:[],&quot;errors&quot;:[],&quot;htmlHash&quot;:&quot;355d6223&quot;,&quot;data&quot;:{&quot;course&quot;:[],&quot;student&quot;:null,&quot;liveTime&quot;:null,&quot;nextLiveTime&quot;:&quot;2026-02-25T14:00:00+0700&quot;},&quot;dataMeta&quot;:{&quot;models&quot;:{&quot;course&quot;:{&quot;class&quot;:&quot;App\\Models\\Course&quot;,&quot;id&quot;:&quot;694125f87c87ae99f709ee7f&quot;,&quot;relations&quot;:[&quot;teacherProfile&quot;],&quot;connection&quot;:&quot;mongodb&quot;,&quot;collectionClass&quot;:null}},&quot;dates&quot;:{&quot;nextLiveTime&quot;:&quot;carbon&quot;}},&quot;checksum&quot;:&quot;159dbb0ebb5aad5a31a67cb264feeee6d51364f067aeb8199a0fa481e84947af&quot;}}" wire:poll.64603s="$refresh"     class="w-full h-full flex flex-col relative border border-[#D9D9D9] transition duration-300 rounded-lg sm:rounded-xl hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-green-300 overflow-hidden">

    <!-- Upcoming course header with timer -->
    <div
        class="bg-[#83C556] px-1.5 sm:px-2.5 py-1 sm:py-1.5 md:py-3 flex justify-between items-center relative m-0.5 sm:m-1 md:m-2 rounded-lg sm:rounded-xl">
        <div class="text-black font-bold text-[10px] xs:text-xs sm:text-sm md:text-base space-y-0.5">
                            <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center gap-1 md:gap-2">
                    <span class="truncate">กำลังจะเริ่มขึ้น</span>
                    <span class="font-medium text-[#F55B5D] bg-white/80 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md">
                        25 ก.พ. 2026
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div
    x-data="
{
    timer: {
        days: '00',
        hours: '17',
        minutes: '56',
        seconds: '43',
    },
    startCounter: function () {
        let runningCounter = setInterval(() => {
            let countDownDate = new Date(1772002800 * 1000).getTime();
            let timeDistance = countDownDate - new Date().getTime();

            if (timeDistance < 0) {
                clearInterval(runningCounter);

                return;
            }

            this.timer.days = this.formatCounter(Math.floor(timeDistance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)));
            this.timer.hours = this.formatCounter(Math.floor((timeDistance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60)));
            this.timer.minutes = this.formatCounter(Math.floor((timeDistance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60)));
            this.timer.seconds = this.formatCounter(Math.floor((timeDistance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000));
        }, 1000);
    },
    formatCounter: function (number) {
        return number.toString().padStart(2, '0');
    }
}
"
    x-init="startCounter()"
    inline="inline" class="flex items-center bg-white/70 rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 md:py-1 md:px-2 text-green-800"
>
            <span x-text="timer.hours > 9 ? timer.hours : '0' + timer.hours">17</span>:
                    <span
                        x-text="timer.minutes > 9 ? timer.minutes : '0' + timer.minutes">56</span>:
                    <span
                        x-text="timer.seconds > 9 ? timer.seconds : '0' + timer.seconds">43</span>
    </div>
                    </div>
        <div class="rounded-full w-8 h-8 sm:w-10 sm:h-10 md:w-15 md:h-15 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <img src="https://younghappyplus.com/assets/images/free_course.png" alt="Free"
                    class="w-8 h-8 sm:w-10 sm:h-10 md:w-15 md:h-15">
                    </div>
    </div>

            <div id="shop-section">
            <div wire:id="5udWU6OInwYDgJyDzJAe" wire:initial-data="{&quot;fingerprint&quot;:{&quot;id&quot;:&quot;5udWU6OInwYDgJyDzJAe&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;bannerhome.bannerhome&quot;,&quot;locale&quot;:&quot;th&quot;,&quot;path&quot;:&quot;\/&quot;,&quot;method&quot;:&quot;GET&quot;,&quot;v&quot;:&quot;acj&quot;},&quot;effects&quot;:{&quot;listeners&quot;:[],&quot;path&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com&quot;},&quot;serverMemo&quot;:{&quot;children&quot;:[],&quot;errors&quot;:[],&quot;htmlHash&quot;:&quot;8d5c41b1&quot;,&quot;data&quot;:{&quot;position&quot;:&quot;Market&quot;,&quot;page&quot;:1,&quot;paginators&quot;:{&quot;page&quot;:1}},&quot;dataMeta&quot;:[],&quot;checksum&quot;:&quot;2ddb49ca85d9904657564aa342f5bd01579d0d2b84ba2f0419b1528c30d0662b&quot;}}">
    <div x-data="bannerRotation([{&quot;image&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/younghappyplus.com\/storage\/banners\/QOIrPq5otPHjdqO7zkaPhKeSSW85SN-metaYmFubmVyIEZpZ21hX2hhcHB5IHRyaXAucG5n-.png&quot;,&quot;duration&quot;:15000,&quot;click_url&quot;:&quot;https:\/\/www.younghappyplus.com\/section\/HAPPYTRIP&quot;}])" x-init="startRotation()" x-show="banners.length > 0 && currentPage !== null">
        <div class="flex w-full">
            <template x-for="(banner, index) in banners" :key="index">
                <div x-show="currentPage === index" 
                     class="w-full transition-opacity duration-500"
                     :class="{ 'cursor-pointer': banner.click_url }">
                    <a :href="banner.click_url" 
                       x-bind:target="banner.click_url ? '_blank' : ''"
                       class="block">
                        <img :src="banner.image" 
                             class="w-full h-auto object-cover">
                    </a>
                </div>
            </template>
        </div>
        <div class="text-center py-5 -my-2 
                            bg-[#E5F1E2]
                    ">
            <ul class="flex justify-center">
                <template x-for="(banner, index) in banners" :key="index">
                    <li>
                        <button 
                            type="button" 
                            x-on:click="stopRotation(); currentPage = index; startRotation()"
                            class="pagination__dot" 
                            :class="{ 'active': currentPage === index }">
                        </button>
                    </li>
                </template>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    function bannerRotation(banners) {
        return {
            banners,
            currentPage: 0,
            timer: null,
            startRotation() {
                if (this.timer) clearInterval(this.timer);
                const currentDuration = this.banners[this.currentPage]?.duration || 5000;

                this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                    this.nextPage();
                }, currentDuration);
            },
            nextPage() {
                this.currentPage = (this.currentPage + 1) % this.banners.length;
                this.startRotation();
            },
            stopRotation() {
                clearInterval(this.timer);
            }
        };
    }
</script>

<style>
    .pagination__dot {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin: 0 5px;
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .pagination__dot:hover {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        transform: scale(1.2);
    }

    .pagination__dot.active {
        background-color: #FFDA20;
        transform: scale(1.3);
    }
</style>

                            x-on:click="stopRotation(); currentPage = index; startRotation()"

                            :class="{ 'active': currentPage === index }">
                        </button>

<script>
    function bannerRotation(banners) {
        return {
            banners,
            currentPage: 0,
            timer: null,
            startRotation() {
                if (this.timer) clearInterval(this.timer);
                const currentDuration = this.banners[this.currentPage]?.duration || 5000;

                this.timer = setInterval(() => {
                    this.nextPage();
                }, currentDuration);
            },
            nextPage() {
                this.currentPage = (this.currentPage + 1) % this.banners.length;
                this.startRotation();
            },
            stopRotation() {
                clearInterval(this.timer);
            }
        };
    }
</script>

<style>
    .pagination__dot {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin: 0 5px;
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .pagination__dot:hover {
        background-color: #ffefa0;
        transform: scale(1.2);
    }

    .pagination__dot.active {
        background-color: #FFDA20;
        transform: scale(1.3);
    }
</style>

<!-- Livewire Component wire-end:kZhe8RYx0KhDNc7eJcYL -->

    <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-3">
        <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-6">
            <h2 class="text-white text-xl sm:text-4xl font-bold ">บทความจาก YH+</h2>
        </div>
        <div
            class="flex items-center justify-between gap-0.5 sm:gap-1 md:gap-4 px-0.5 sm:px-1 md:px-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
            <button wire:click="previousPage"
                class="flex-none z-10 bg-[#2C662D] hover:bg-[#1D5226] text-white rounded-full p-1.5 sm:p-2 md:p-4 shadow-lg focus:outline-none transition duration-300 hover:scale-110 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                disabled>
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-5 w-5 sm:h-6 sm:w-6 md:h-7 md:w-7" fill="none"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                </svg>
            </button>
                            <div class="p-1 sm:p-2 bg-white rounded-2xl sm:rounded-3xl w-full h-full block">
                    <div class="flex w-full items-center my-1 lg:my-2 sm:my-1 xl:h-12 lg:h-10 md:h-12 sm:h-10 h-8">
                        <div class="font-semibold rounded-3xl items-center grid grid-rows-12 grid-flow-col text-white h-full text-xs 2xl:text-xl xl:text-lg lg:text-sm md:text-lg sm:text-base w-full"
                            style="background-color: #F26D70;">
                            <div
                                class="h-full items-center 2xl:row-start-4 2xl:col-start-2 2xl:col-span-6 xl:row-start-4 xl:col-start-2 xl:col-span-6 lg:row-start-4 lg:col-start-2 lg:col-span-6 md:row-start-4 md:col-start-2 md:col-span-6 sm:row-start-4 sm:col-start-5 sm:col-span-6 custom:row-start-4 custom:col-start-3 custom:col-span-6 row-start-4 col-start-3 col-span-12">
                                คอนเทนต์มาแรง
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="relative">
                        <a href="#" wire:click.prevent="loadArticle('699d8cda59182dd33d0489d3')" class="block cursor-pointer">
                            <img src="https://younghappyplus.com/storage/article/17ac6c2Np5irttghxGa0hkzev9DMCa-metaMTYgQ29udGVudF9mZWIyNi0xN18wLmpwZw==-.jpg" alt="Head Picture"
                                class="w-full aspect-w-16 aspect-h-9 object-cover rounded-xl" loading="lazy">
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
                            <div class="p-1 sm:p-2 bg-white rounded-2xl sm:rounded-3xl w-full h-full block">
                    <div class="flex w-full items-center my-1 lg:my-2 sm:my-1 xl:h-12 lg:h-10 md:h-12 sm:h-10 h-8">
                        <div class="font-semibold rounded-3xl items-center grid grid-rows-12 grid-flow-col text-white h-full text-xs 2xl:text-xl xl:text-lg lg:text-sm md:text-lg sm:text-base w-full"
                            style="background-color: #F26D70;">
                            <div
                                class="h-full items-center 2xl:row-start-4 2xl:col-start-2 2xl:col-span-6 xl:row-start-4 xl:col-start-2 xl:col-span-6 lg:row-start-4 lg:col-start-2 lg:col-span-6 md:row-start-4 md:col-start-2 md:col-span-6 sm:row-start-4 sm:col-start-5 sm:col-span-6 custom:row-start-4 custom:col-start-3 custom:col-span-6 row-start-4 col-start-3 col-span-12">
                                คอนเทนต์มาแรง
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

        <div class="google-ad-wrapper py-2">

    <div wire:id="Ht48WBHC0tp4zPkeF6Pw" wire:initial-data="{&quot;fingerprint&quot;:{&quot;id&quot;:&quot;Ht48WBHC0tp4zPkeF6Pw&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;common.view-course&quot;,&quot;locale&quot;:&quot;th&quot;,&quot;path&quot;:&quot;\/&quot;,&quot;method&quot;:&quot;GET&quot;,&quot;v&quot;:&quot;acj&quot;},&quot;effects&quot;:{&quot;listeners&quot;:[&quot;getCourse&quot;]},&quot;serverMemo&quot;:{&quot;children&quot;:[],&quot;errors&quot;:[],&quot;htmlHash&quot;:&quot;ba2f08d5&quot;,&quot;data&quot;:{&quot;courseDetail&quot;:null,&quot;loadData&quot;:false,&quot;showingModal&quot;:false,&quot;listeners&quot;:[&quot;getCourse&quot;]},&quot;dataMeta&quot;:[],&quot;checksum&quot;:&quot;ccc92fece06ab59117aa60a57532cb4af116896c0e6558fd6d6f887facd5fc03&quot;}}"
    x-data="{ show: window.Livewire.find('Ht48WBHC0tp4zPkeF6Pw').entangle('showingModal').defer }"
    x-on:close.stop="show = false"
    x-on:keydown.escape.window="show = false"
    x-show="show"

    style="display: none;"

    <div x-show="show" class="fixed inset-0 transform transition-all" x-on:click="show = false" x-transition:enter="ease-out duration-300"

<script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-8672612615023122"
    crossorigin="anonymous"></script>


<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        // เพิ่ม event listener สำหรับลิงก์ที่มี hash
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                const targetId = this.getAttribute('href');
                if (targetId === '#') return; // ถ้าเป็นแค่ # ไม่ต้องทำอะไร

                const targetElement = document.querySelector(targetId);
                if (targetElement) {
                    // กำหนดระยะห่างจากด้านบนเมื่อเลื่อนไปยังเป้าหมาย (offset)
                    const offset = 80; // ปรับตามความเหมาะสม เช่น ถ้ามี navbar ที่มีความสูง 80px
                    const targetPosition = targetElement.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - offset;

                    window.scrollTo({
                        top: targetPosition,
                        behavior: 'smooth'
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    });

    // สำหรับ Google AdSense
    (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

    // แสดงข้อความ "โฆษณาจากบริการภายนอก" เมื่อโฆษณาถูกเสิร์ฟแล้ว
    (function () {
        function setupExternalAdLabels() {
            const wrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.google-ad-wrapper');
            if (!wrappers.length) return;

            wrappers.forEach(wrapper => {
                const label = wrapper.querySelector('.external-ad-label');
                if (!label) return;

                function checkAdServed() {
                    const iframe = wrapper.querySelector('iframe');
                    if (iframe && iframe.offsetWidth > 0 && iframe.offsetHeight > 0) {
                        label.style.display = 'block';
                        observer.disconnect();
                    }
                }

                const observer = new MutationObserver(checkAdServed);
                observer.observe(wrapper, { childList: true, subtree: true });

                // กันพลาดเช็คซ้ำหลังโหลดหน้า
                window.addEventListener('load', function () {
                    setTimeout(checkAdServed, 2000);
                });
            });
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupExternalAdLabels);
        } else {
            setupExternalAdLabels();
        }
    })();
</script>
<!-- Livewire Component wire-end:tQ167HNCjf6ce6hsvHDV -->
    </main>
    <div class="mx-auto px-6 py-10 bg-green-800">

                <p><strong>Tel :</strong> 06-5506-2889</p>
            </div>

            </a>

                <img src="https://younghappyplus.com/assets/images/footer_youtube.png" alt="YouTube" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full p-1.5">
            </a>
            <a href="https://www.facebook.com/share/1FgkTTXUCr/?mibextid=wwXIfr" aria-label="Facebook">
                <img src="https://younghappyplus.com/assets/images/footer_facebook.png" alt="Facebook" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full p-1.5">
            </a>
        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="flex flex-col-reverse items-center text-center text-sm gap-y-4">

object"),r.delegate=null,h)}function j(e){var t={tryLoc:e[0]};1 in e&&(t.catchLoc=e[1]),2 in e&&(t.finallyLoc=e[2],t.afterLoc=e[3]),this.tryEntries.push(t)}function P(e){var t=this.tryEntries.length-1;t>=0;--t){var r=this.tryEntries[t];if(r.finallyLoc===e)return this.complete(r.completion,r.afterLoc),P(r),h}},catch:function(e){for(var t=this.tryEntries.length-1;t>=0;--t){var r=this.tryEntries[t];if(r.tryLoc===e){var n=r.completion;if("throw"===n.type){var o=n.arg;P(r)}return o}}throw new Error("illegal catch attempt")},delegateYield:function(e,r,n){return ownKeys(e,t){var r=Object.keys(e);if(Object.getOwnPropertySymbols){var n=Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(e);t&&(n=n.filter((function(t){return e}function _defineProperty(e,t,r){return t in e?Object.defineProperty(e,t,{value:r,enumerable:!0,configurable:!0,writable:!0}):e[t]=r,e}function asyncGeneratorStep(e,t,r,n,o,i,a){try{var c=e[i](a),s=c.value}catch(e){return void r(e)}c.done?t(s):Promise.resolve(s).then(n,o)}function _asyncToGenerator(e){return function(){var t=this,r=arguments;return new Promise((function(n,o){var i=e.apply(t,r);function a(e){asyncGeneratorStep(i,n,o,a,c,"next",e)}function c(e){asyncGeneratorStep(i,n,o,a,c,"throw",e)}a(void 0)}))}}function evalCallbacksOptions(options){for(var callbackKey=_callbacksKeysAllowed[_i];options.hasOwnProperty(callbackKey)&&("string"==typeof options[callbackKey]||options[callbackKey]instanceof String)&&options[callbackKey]&&""!=options[callbackKey].trim()&&(options[callbackKey]=eval(options[callbackKey]))}}function afterAlertInteraction(e){if(e.confirmed)return"self"===e.onConfirmed.component?void Livewire.find(e.onConfirmed.id).emitSelf(e.onConfirmed.listener,e.result):void Livewire.emitTo(e.onConfirmed.component,e.onConfirmed.listener,e.result);if(e.isDenied)return"self"===e.onDenied.component?void Livewire.find(e.onDenied.id).emitSelf(e.onDenied.listener,e.result):void Livewire.emitTo(e.onDenied.component,e.onDenied.listener,e.result);if(e.onProgressFinished&&e.dismiss===Swal.DismissReason.timer)return"self"===e.onProgressFinished.component?void Livewire.find(e.onProgressFinished.id).emitSelf(e.onProgressFinished.listener,e.result):void Livewire.find(e.onDismissed.id).emit(e.onDismissed.listener,e.result);Livewire.emitTo(e.onDismissed.component,e.onDismissed.listener,e.result)}}window.addEventListener("alert",function(){var 8:afterAlertInteraction(_objectSpread(_objectSpread(_objectSpread({confirmed:(l=e.sent).isConfirmed,denied:l.isDenied,dismiss:l.dismiss,result:_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},l),{},{data:_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},a),{},{inputAttributes:null!==(n=s.inputAttributes)&&void 0!==n?n:null})})},c),l),s));case 10:case"end":return e.stop()}}),e)})));return function(t){return e.apply(this,arguments)}}()),window.flashAlert=function(){var     <div wire:id="22VzWplgWFnbgcv4pCju" wire:initial-data="{&quot;fingerprint&quot;:{&quot;id&quot;:&quot;22VzWplgWFnbgcv4pCju&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;notifications&quot;,&quot;locale&quot;:&quot;th&quot;,&quot;path&quot;:&quot;\/&quot;,&quot;method&quot;:&quot;GET&quot;,&quot;v&quot;:&quot;acj&quot;},&quot;effects&quot;:{&quot;listeners&quot;:[&quot;notificationSent&quot;,&quot;notificationsSent&quot;,&quot;notificationClosed&quot;]},&quot;serverMemo&quot;:{&quot;children&quot;:[],&quot;errors&quot;:[],&quot;htmlHash&quot;:&quot;7b6549b0&quot;,&quot;data&quot;:{&quot;isFilamentNotificationsComponent&quot;:true,&quot;notifications&quot;:[]},&quot;dataMeta&quot;:{&quot;wireables&quot;:[&quot;notifications&quot;]},&quot;checksum&quot;:&quot;44eb598a142fb62f32bb84c922e9d8c02dcd7c357d3af110e8e0b6e26796b236&quot;}}">
    <div
        class="filament-notifications pointer-events-none fixed inset-4 z-50 mx-auto flex gap-3 items-end flex-col-reverse justify-end"
        role="status"
    >
            </div>

    
    </div>

<!-- Livewire Component wire-end:22VzWplgWFnbgcv4pCju -->    </body>

<script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag() { dataLayer.push(arguments); }
    gtag('js', new Date());

    gtag('config', 'G-GV6NG0SL9X');
</script>

<script>
    // แสดงข้อความ "โฆษณาจากบริการภายนอก" เมื่อโฆษณาจาก Google ถูกเสิร์ฟแล้ว
    (function () {
        function setupExternalAdLabels() {
            const wrappers = document.querySelectorAll('.google-ad-wrapper');
            if (!wrappers.length) return;

            wrappers.forEach(wrapper => {
                const label = wrapper.querySelector('.external-ad-label');
                if (!label) return;

                function checkAdServed() {
                    const iframe = wrapper.querySelector('iframe');
                    if (iframe && iframe.offsetWidth > 0 && iframe.offsetHeight > 0) {
                        label.style.display = 'block';
                        if (observer) {
                            observer.disconnect();
                        }
                    }
                }

                const observer = new MutationObserver(checkAdServed);
                observer.observe(wrapper, { childList: true, subtree: true });

                // กันพลาด: เช็คอีกครั้งหลังโหลดหน้า
                window.addEventListener('load', function () {
                    setTimeout(checkAdServed, 2000);
                });
            });
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupExternalAdLabels);
        } else {
            setupExternalAdLabels();
        }
    })();
</script>

</html>
